name: Inside Links at Crystal Lake
about: Inside Links at Crystal Lake is an indoor golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art golf simulation experiences for players of all skill levels. The facility provides a welcoming environment for golfers to enjoy the game, enhance their skills through lessons, and participate in leagues, particularly during the off-season. With a focus on flexibility and accessibility, the venue offers a range of pricing options, including discounts for members and seniors, ensuring a premium golf experience at various budget points. The space is designed to cater to both casual players and those looking for serious practice, complemented by on-site dining options.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators with flexible booking options
Senior and member discounts for affordability
On-site pub menu and full bar for dining and socializing
Weekly leagues and match play opportunities for competitive play
Available for corporate events and private gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a pub menu served throughout the day

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based simulator technology for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, but the venue offers a full pub menu and bar service on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take about 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is primarily focused on adult golfers, but children may participate under adult supervision.
